title: The Christmas Workshop 82000 Angel Christmas Tree Topper / 12” Tall/Red & Gold Coloured/Indoor Christmas Decoration
features: CHRISTMAS TREE TOPPER – This majestic angel Christmas tree topper will provide a striking focal point and become the perfect centrepiece for your Christmas tree this festive season.
RED & GOLD ANGEL – This Christmas angel wears a red and gold dress, colours synonymous with the festive season, making it seamlessly blend in with the other Christmas decorations on your tree.
PERFECT SIZE - This Christmas decoration measures 12 inches (30cm) in height, making it clearly visible even on the tallest of Christmas trees.
FEATHERED WINGS – The angel features feathered wings which gives it a traditional feel whilst also adding to the overall beauty of the Christmas decoration.

CHRISTMAS WORKSHOP – The Christmas Workshop is the leading supplier of all things Christmas related! From Christmas trees & train sets, to fairy lights and projector lights, you can find everything to decorate your home at the Christmas Workshop Amazon page.
description: Product Description Previous page Versatile Display Style your angel on top of your tree, tabletop, or mantel. Striking Focal Point The perfect centrepiece for your Christmas tree this festive season. Stunning Detail Each angel's outfit features exquisite detail. Festive Colours Rich tones blend seamlessly with the other Christmas decorations on your tree. Charming Designs Choose from 7 different angel designs.
